mnemonics.title: MMU Function
mnemonics.content: MMU: Memory Mapper Ultimate (translates virtual to physical)

mnemonics.title: Address Types
mnemonics.content: Physical = Real RAM, Logical = Virtual Plan

mnemonics.title: Page Table Components
mnemonics.content: VPN + Offset = PFN + Offset (Virtual Page Number to Physical Frame Number)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine post office boxes (logical) mapping to physical mail slots
Picture dividing memory into equal-sized photo frames (physical) and album pages (virtual)
Visualize memory as puzzle pieces of different sizes representing code/data/stack segments

analogies.analogy: Apartment numbers in a building - doesn't reflect actual physical layout
Book index linking chapter pages (virtual) to physical book pages
Frequently used contacts list for quick dialing instead of looking up full phonebook
